eas_text: A civil authority has issued A MISSING AND ENDANGERED PERSON ALERT for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; Arizona; at 9:50 PM on JUN 23, 2026 Effective until 7:50 AM JUN 24, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. A Turquoise Alert has been issued on behalf of the Apache Junction Police Department. We have received information regarding a missing endangered juvenile in Apache Junction, Arizona. Authorities are searching for 13-year-old Skyler Conville, a white female, 5 feet 8 inches tall, weighing approximately 125 pounds, with brown hair and blue eyes. Skyler was last seen on June 19, 2026, wearing camouflage pants, a dark gray shirt, and a pink bonnet. Surveillance footage shows Skyler entering a white early-2000s Chevrolet Impala driven by an unidentified male believed to be in his 50s or 60s. Anyone with information regarding Skylers whereabouts is asked to call 911 immediately. Authorities are searching for 13-year-old Skyler Conville of Apache Junction, Arizona.
